candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row explicitly tied to the COGS/cost of revenues bucket. However, the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' appears to already include it: the 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value' is lower by about the same amount as this amortization row, indicating this D&A is a sub-component embedded in the selected COGS total.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row is SG&A-related, not COGS-related, so it is not a valid COGS_DA addition.

variables.notes: Do not add separate COGS D&A. The explicit cost-of-revenues amortization appears already embedded in the selected 'Cost of goods sold' row, so adding it would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This label appears twice, once under 'Selling expenses' and once under 'Administrative expenses'. In both cases it appears to be a component nested within the already selected parent rows: 'Selling expenses - Balancing value' is lower than 'Selling expenses' by about the amortization amount, and 'Administrative expenses - Balancing value' is lower than 'Administrative expenses' by the combined effect of the transaction-cost row and the amortization row. That indicates the selected SG&A component rows already include these amortization amounts.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This row belongs to COGS/cost of revenues, not SG&A, so it is not a valid XSGA_DA addition.

variables.notes: Do not add separate SG&A D&A. The SG&A amortization rows appear to be sub-components already embedded in the selected 'Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses' rows. Also no separate same-level SG&A D&A summary row should be added.
